quote: Sustainability, I believe, can be really the core of a competitive advantage for a company.
reason: The thesis of the whole talk in one line — reframes sustainability as strategic leverage, not cost, exactly how a CSO needs to defend it upward.

quote: A recent study was published a month ago saying that 98% of the claims done in the US in the dairy and meat industries were false claims, which led to a lot of greenwashing within that industry.
reason: A provocative, specific statistic that names the credibility gap decision-makers fear most and positions the brand on the substance side of the line.

quote: I don't know if you believe this 1.5-degree target is feasible — the quick answer is no. We are very, very far from the targets, and what's surprising is that nobody is actually talking about this today.
reason: Contrarian and authoritative — the calm, unflinching read of reality that signals a peer who tells the truth rather than performing optimism.

quote: I really believe entrepreneurship is key to tackle this. We do not need one solution — we need millions of solutions from everywhere.
reason: Shifts from problem to agency, activating ambition and matching the Ruler's instinct to show the path forward rather than dwell on the crisis.

quote: You need to fall in love with the problem you are tackling, not with the solution — because falling in love with the solution, you might be misled from the actual needs.
reason: A memorable, quotable principle that travels well as a standalone short and demonstrates framework-level thinking to a founder audience.
